summary: Test creates a task on the app-default path (repo/workflow declare no pair), then flips harness_registry.DEFAULT_HARNESS to codex and re-reads over REST through the real service+SQLAlchemy store: a null-sentinel or read-time-resolved harness would surface codex/None and fail; the monkeypatch is effective because service.py:424 and get_harness read the module global dynamically.
